response.original_title: A Story of a Murderer: DECEIT
response.overview: A group of classmates sets out on a camping trip, expecting nothing more than a fun and memorable getaway filled with laughter, bonding, and adventure. Surrounded by the peaceful beauty of nature, everything seems perfect until a horrifying and unexpected incident shatters their carefree experience. As fear and panic spread through the group, they realize that the nightmare is far from over. Trapped in the wilderness, they must work together to uncover the truth behind the terrifying events while struggling to survive. Along the way, friendships are tested, secrets come to light, and every decision could mean the difference between life and death. What was meant to be an unforgettable vacation soon turns into a fight for survival that will haunt them forever.
response.tagline: Some trips create memories. This one created nightmares.
response.title: A Story of a Murderer: DECEIT
